record.field: User Node Subscription - Node Created (Pending Activation)
Zeeve | ${object.protocol_id.name or 'Node'} ${((object.subscription_type or '').replace('_', ' ').title()) if object.subscription_type else ''} Node Created – Activation in Progress

t.t-value: company_logo_raw and (company_logo_raw.decode() if hasattr(company_logo_raw, 'decode') else company_logo_raw)
getattr(object, 'amount_month', False) or (object.sub_plan_id.amount_month if object.sub_plan_id else False) or object.price
monthly_amount and formatLang(monthly_amount, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)
object.price and formatLang(object.price, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)

div.p: Activation in Progress – we'll notify you as soon as it's ready.
Your subscription request for has been received. Our engineers are provisioning your node now. As soon as the infrastructure is finalised, you will receive a confirmation that the node is active.
We are conducting all the checks needed to guarantee enterprise-grade reliability for your infrastructure. You'll receive another email the moment the node becomes fully operational.
If you have any questions, reply to this email or reach us at .

record.field: Zeeve | ${object.protocol_id.name or 'Node'} ${((object.subscription_type or '').replace('_', ' ').title()) if object.subscription_type else ''} Subscription Activated

t.t-value: company_logo_raw and (company_logo_raw.decode() if hasattr(company_logo_raw, 'decode') else company_logo_raw)
getattr(object, 'amount_month', False) or (object.sub_plan_id.amount_month if object.sub_plan_id else False) or object.price
monthly_amount and formatLang(monthly_amount, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)
object.price and formatLang(object.price, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)

div.p: Your node is ready to serve requests.
Great news! Your subscription for is now live. You can start leveraging Zeeve's enterprise-grade infrastructure immediately.
Access endpoints, credentials, and monitoring insights right from your Zeeve dashboard. We recommend bookmarking the panel for quick operations management.
Need assistance or customised scaling? Our experts are here to help at .

t.t-value: company_logo_raw and (company_logo_raw.decode() if hasattr(company_logo_raw, 'decode') else company_logo_raw)
getattr(object, 'amount_month', False) or (object.sub_plan_id.amount_month if object.sub_plan_id else False) or object.price
monthly_amount and formatLang(monthly_amount, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)
object.price and formatLang(object.price, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)

div.p: We need a few details to finalise your protocol deployment.

Thanks for subscribing to Zeeve's managed services. To activate your infrastructure, we need your configuration inputs. Please review the subscription snapshot below and complete the configuration form to avoid delays.
Here's what we need from you:

ul.li: Complete protocol-specific parameters such as wallet addresses, whitelists, or seed peers.
Upload any mandatory credentials or certificates required for secure deployment.
Confirm operational preferences (maintenance windows, alert routing, team contacts).

div.p: Once submitted, our engineers will finalise provisioning and update you as soon as the node is live.
Need assistance with the requirements? Reach our onboarding specialists at .

record.field: Zeeve | ${object.protocol_id.name or 'Node'} ${((object.subscription_type or '').replace('_', ' ').title()) if object.subscription_type else ''} Subscription Upgraded

t.t-value: company_logo_raw and (company_logo_raw.decode() if hasattr(company_logo_raw, 'decode') else company_logo_raw)
getattr(object, 'amount_month', False) or (object.sub_plan_id.amount_month if object.sub_plan_id else False) or object.price
monthly_amount and formatLang(monthly_amount, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)
object.price and formatLang(object.price, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)

div.p: Enhanced capacity and performance are now enabled.
Your Zeeve subscription for has been successfully upgraded. The new plan benefits are live, ensuring higher throughput and premium support.
Explore your dashboard for updated metrics and scaling possibilities. Our team is available to help you extract maximum value from the upgrade.
For architectural guidance, contact us at .

record.field: Zeeve | ${object.protocol_id.name or 'Node'} ${((object.subscription_type or '').replace('_', ' ').title()) if object.subscription_type else ''} Subscription Downgraded

t.t-value: company_logo_raw and (company_logo_raw.decode() if hasattr(company_logo_raw, 'decode') else company_logo_raw)
getattr(object, 'amount_month', False) or (object.sub_plan_id.amount_month if object.sub_plan_id else False) or object.price
monthly_amount and formatLang(monthly_amount, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)
object.price and formatLang(object.price, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)

div.p: Your subscription has been updated as requested.
We have completed the downgrade of your subscription for . Your services continue uninterrupted with the capabilities of your new plan.
You can revisit your dashboard anytime to explore other plans or scale when requirements evolve.

record.field: Zeeve | ${object.protocol_id.name or 'Node'} ${((object.subscription_type or '').replace('_', ' ').title()) if object.subscription_type else ''} Subscription Cancelled

t.t-value: company_logo_raw and (company_logo_raw.decode() if hasattr(company_logo_raw, 'decode') else company_logo_raw)
getattr(object, 'amount_month', False) or (object.sub_plan_id.amount_month if object.sub_plan_id else False) or object.price
monthly_amount and formatLang(monthly_amount, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)
object.price and formatLang(object.price, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)

div.p: This is to confirm that your subscription for has been cancelled. Your node access will be discontinued in line with the agreed termination terms.
If this cancellation was unintentional or you'd like to reactivate the service, let us know and we'll assist you immediately.
We appreciate the trust you placed in Zeeve. We're ready whenever you need enterprise-grade blockchain infrastructure again.

t.t-value: company_logo_raw and (company_logo_raw.decode() if hasattr(company_logo_raw, 'decode') else company_logo_raw)

div.p: A new subscription for is live. Review the highlights below or open the Zeeve admin dashboard.
A customer has subscribed to the stack on the plan. Below is a quick snapshot to help you coordinate provisioning.
Need to adjust provisioning or notify the success team? Coordinate via the dashboard or reply to this email.
